subject: Update to latest guilin docker images
commit_message:
Update to latest guilin docker images

Also update the pods to not use unlimited for the flavor
Change also includes traversal, graphadmin, data router
to be not using the root user

Issue-ID: AAI-3175
Issue-ID: AAI-3180
Change-Id: Ia2237c0ff8025bb2649ef381ae447e6d39961674
Signed-off-by: Harish Venkata Kajur <vk250x@att.com>

entries.message: Uploaded patch set 1.

Patch Set 1:

on pnf registrate, I see we have a 404 on:

alias=aai, uri=/aai/v11/service-design-and-creation/services, headers={'Accept': 'application/json', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'X-TransactionId': 'd7776afc-ca93-4578-b611-dd485a9a9595', 'X-FromAppId': 'robot-ete'} json=None
Received response from [aai]: {"requestError":{"serviceException":{"messageId":"SVC3001","text":"Resource not found for %1 using id %2 (msg=%3) (ec=%4)","variables":["GET","service-design-and-creation/services","Node Not Found:No Node of type service found at: service-design-and-creation/services","ERR.5.4.6114"]}}}


for the logs, I just figured out that we're gathering them __before__ launching e2e tests...
Let me think on how to do differently!

Patch Set 1:

results look good
for pnf-registrate, a correction had been provided but it seems not taken into account
I noticed recently sme issues
xtesting docker on 10003 (staging) was ok but on 10001 it was an old one
So I set 10003 in xtesting-onap
could we have some caching of the docker on the controler? I do not think so
we have imagePullPolicy: Always in the job we are running for all the robot pod, so we should download the latest versions
